_comment: Centralized INTENT_GATE routing table. Used by pre-tool-use.mjs and pre-compact.mjs. IMPORTANT: trigger strings listed here are illustrative examples only. Routing MUST fall back to semantic intent matching — the user goal described in the 'intent' field — when no literal trigger matches. Adding new keywords without a corresponding intent description is prohibited.

init/setup/initialize.intent: User wants to initialize or set up the QE framework in a project for the first time

generate-spec/spec-document/task-request.intent: User wants to create a structured task specification or requirement document before implementation

run-task/execute-task.intent: User wants to execute a previously created task request through the QE orchestration loop

research/compare/investigate/deep-resear.intent: User wants in-depth investigation, comparison, or structured research on a topic

bug/error/not-working/crash.intent: User is experiencing a failure, crash, or unexpected behavior and needs root cause analysis

code-review/review-code.intent: User wants a code quality review with feedback on correctness, style, and best practices

write-test/test-coverage/unit-test.intent: User wants to create automated test coverage for existing or new code

write-docs/documentation/explain-code.intent: User wants human-readable documentation or explanation of code behavior

commit/push.intent: User wants to stage and commit changes to version control, or push to a remote

refresh/sync/update-analysis.intent: User wants to refresh stale analysis files or resynchronize project context

debug-method/root-cause/systematic-debug.intent: User wants a structured, methodical debugging process rather than ad-hoc guessing

TDD/test-first/red-green-refactor.intent: User wants to develop code following the test-driven development cycle

design-UI/frontend-design/dashboard.intent: User wants UI/UX design guidance or frontend component design

architecture-diagram/C4/system-context.intent: User wants a structured architecture diagram using the C4 model or similar notation

database-schema/DB-design/ERD.intent: User wants to design or review a database schema, entity relationships, or table structure

help/how-to/show-commands.intent: User is asking for help, available commands, or how to use the QE framework

browser/navigate-web/scrape/screenshot.intent: User wants to automate browser interactions, web scraping, or capture screenshots

PRD/product-requirements/create-PRD.intent: User wants to create a Product Requirements Document for a feature or product

roadmap/quarterly-plan.intent: User wants to plan or visualize a product or project roadmap over time

user-story/acceptance-criteria/write-use.intent: User wants to write user stories or acceptance criteria from a product perspective

resume/restore-session.intent: User wants to resume or restore context from a previously interrupted session

mermaid/sequence-diagram/flowchart.intent: User wants to create a Mermaid diagram — sequence, flowchart, or similar visual notation

docx/word-document.intent: User wants to produce a Word-format (.docx) document

pptx/slides/presentation/create-presenta.intent: User wants to create a slide deck or presentation

xlsx/spreadsheet/excel/create-spreadshee.intent: User wants to create or manipulate a spreadsheet or Excel file

pdf/pdf-report.intent: User wants to generate or export content as a PDF document

image-analysis/analyze-image.intent: User wants to extract information or insights from an image or screenshot

transcribe-audio/audio-to-text.intent: User wants to convert audio or voice recordings into text

youtube-subtitle/video-caption.intent: User wants to retrieve or process subtitles or captions from a video

write-paper/academic-paper.intent: User wants to write or draft an academic paper including introduction, body, or conclusion

reviewer-response/paper-rebuttal.intent: User wants to draft a response to peer reviewer comments on an academic submission

literature-review/research-plan.intent: User wants to conduct a structured literature review or plan a research experiment

seminar-prep/conference-talk.intent: User wants to prepare materials or talking points for an academic seminar or conference

thesis/graduation-thesis.intent: User wants to manage progress on a thesis or dissertation

financial-analysis/valuation/DCF.intent: User wants to perform financial analysis, valuation modeling, or investment research

data-analysis/statistics/correlation.intent: User wants to explore, analyze, or visualize data using statistical methods

writing-clarity/improve-prose.intent: User wants to improve the clarity, conciseness, or readability of written text

humanize/remove-AI-traces.intent: User wants text rewritten to sound naturally human rather than AI-generated

professional-email/team-message.intent: User wants to draft a professional email, Slack message, or team communication

new-skill/edit-skill/create-skill.intent: User wants to create a new QE skill file or edit an existing one

slash-command/new-command/create-command.intent: User wants to define a new slash command or CLI shortcut

find-skill/search-skill.intent: User wants to discover which skill or agent handles a particular use case

command-patterns/my-profile.intent: User wants to view or analyze their own command usage patterns and preferences

alias/shortcut/create-alias.intent: User wants to create a personal shorthand that maps to a skill or command sequence

test-plan/regression-test/QA-plan.intent: User wants a structured QA or regression test plan for a feature or release

spring-security/authentication/CSRF.intent: User wants to configure Spring Security, authentication flows, or CSRF protection

UI-review/accessibility-check.intent: User wants a review of UI design quality or accessibility compliance

MCP-server/MCP-build.intent: User wants to build or configure an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server

docstring/JSDoc/JavaDoc.intent: User wants to add or improve inline code documentation comments

clarify-requirements/unclear-spec.intent: User has ambiguous requirements and wants them refined into actionable specifications

lesson-learned/lessons/retrospective.intent: User wants to document or review lessons learned from a past project or session

compact/save-context.intent: User wants to snapshot the current context to preserve it before the window fills

utopia/autonomous.intent: User wants fully autonomous execution across multiple tasks without manual intervention

update-plugin/upgrade-qe.intent: User wants to update the QE framework plugin to the latest version

migrate-tasks/reorganize-tasks.intent: User wants to migrate or reorganize task files across projects or directories

refactor-instructions/split-CLAUDE.md.intent: User wants to refactor or restructure CLAUDE.md instruction files

jira/jira-ticket/sprint-manage.intent: User wants to manage Jira tickets or sprint planning from the CLI

fact-check/verify-claims.intent: User wants to verify the accuracy of factual claims against authoritative sources

verify-source/credibility-check/SIFT.intent: User wants to assess the credibility or reliability of a source or piece of information

format-convert/md-to-docx.intent: User wants to convert a document from one format to another

content-research/article-draft.intent: User wants to research a topic and produce a draft article or content piece

routing-test/verify-skill-routing.intent: User wants to test or validate that skill routing is working correctly

autoresearch/experiment-loop.intent: User wants to run an autonomous research loop with iterative experimentation

archive-task/completed-archive.intent: User wants to archive completed task files to reduce clutter

quality-loop/code-run-task.intent: User wants to run a combined code quality and task execution loop

mcp-setup/connect-service.intent: User wants to configure an MCP service connection or integration

agentation/visual-feedback/UI-annotation.intent: User wants to set up or use Agentation, the visual UI annotation tool for AI coding agents
